$note: Expected SASS instruction patterns per optimization method (v4). Used by sass_check.py to verify that claimed optimizations actually appear in compiled code. require_any=true means at least one pattern must match; require_any=false means all patterns must match. Empty sass_patterns means SASS-level verification is not applicable (verified by ncu metrics or runtime behavior instead).

compute.tensor_core.note: Tensor Core instructions: HMMA (Ampere FP16/BF16), WGMMA (Hopper), HGMMA (Hopper FP16), UMMA (Blackwell tcgen05), IMMA (INT8), QGMMA (Hopper FP8)

compute.mixed_precision.note: TC instructions or FP16 conversion instructions indicating mixed-precision path

compute.warp_specialization.note: Barrier primitives and register reallocation used for producer-consumer warp coordination

compute.launch_config.note: Launch config is runtime, not visible in SASS — verified by ncu occupancy metrics

compute.thread_coarsening.note: Verified by reduced grid size and increased per-thread instruction count

compute.ilp_unroll_register_tile.note: Dense FMA sequences with register operands indicate outer-product register tile

compute.overlap_compute_memory.note: No specific SASS signature — verified via ncu occupancy/IPC metrics

compute.gemm_softmax_interleave.note: GEMM instructions interleaved with MUFU.EX2 (exp2 for softmax) and mbarrier sync

compute.two_level_accumulation_promotion.note: FP8 WGMMA followed by CUDA-core FFMA promotion (F2F converts FP16 accum to FP32)

compute.fp8_fast_accumulation_mode.note: Fast-accum FP8 WGMMA without interleaved FFMA promotion. Also verified by absence of F2F after WGMMA.

compute.block_scaled_precision.note: Blackwell tcgen05 MMA (UMMA) or FP8 wgmma (QGMMA) with block-scaled operands

compute.tf32_emulation_3xtf32_bf16x6.note: TF32 or BF16 TC instructions used to emulate FP32 via 3x/6x repetition. Verified by dense TF32/BF16 MMA sequences.

compute.mufu_ex2_softmax_replacement.note: SFU ex2.approx.f32 replacing exp() in softmax paths

compute.loop_unroll.note: Verified by checking SASS does NOT have loop back-edge branches in hot region

compute.fma_and_fast_math.note: FMA instructions or MUFU (multi-function unit for fast math: rcp, rsqrt, sin, cos, ex2)

compute.lop3_bit_manipulation.note: Three-operand boolean logic instruction for int4→fp16 bit manipulation dequantization

compute.pragma_no_alias.note: Verified by reduced instruction count and improved IPC — compiler optimization not directly visible

compute.strength_reduce.note: Verified by absence of integer division instructions (IDIV/IMAD.WIDE.S64) in hot loop

compute.branch_eliminate.note: Verified by reduced branch count (BRA/SSY) in SASS and improved warp execution efficiency

compute.handwritten_ptx_inline.note: Verified by matching SASS output to intended PTX inline asm — patterns are case-specific

memory.kernel_fusion.note: Verified by reduced kernel launch count and dram bytes — not a SASS-level signature

memory.coalesced_access.note: Verified via ncu Sectors/Request metric approaching 1

memory.tiling_smem.note: Shared memory store (STS) and load (LDS) instructions

memory.async_copy.note: Async copy: cp.async (Ampere LDGSTS), TMA load (UTMALDG) / TMA store (UTMASTG) on Hopper+

memory.multi_stage_pipeline.note: Async copy with dependency barriers and LDSM for register staging

memory.epilogue_fusion.note: FMA/activation in epilogue before final global store — verified by reduced dram_write_bytes

memory.bank_conflict.note: Verified via ncu bank conflict counter = 0

memory.ldmatrix_stmatrix.note: ldmatrix (LDSM.16.M88.x4) / stmatrix (STSM) / movmatrix (MOVM) for efficient smem→register transfer in TC kernels

memory.tma_multicast.note: TMA load with multicast — UTMALDG with cluster multicast mask

memory.tma_descriptor_tuning.note: TMA instructions — verified by bank_conflict=0 and correct swizzle mode in descriptor

memory.epilogue_visitor_tree_fusion.note: Complex epilogue: FMA/MUFU chained on accumulator + TMA store. Verified by single dram_bytes_write burst.

memory.data_layout.note: Data layout is a host-side concern, not visible in SASS

memory.ldg_cache_modifier_hint.note: Explicit cache modifiers: CG (cache global, bypass L1), CS (streaming), CI (constant invariant)

memory.l2_persistence_window.note: L2 persistence is configured via CUDA runtime API, not visible in kernel SASS

memory.split_k_parallel_reduce.note: Split-K partial results combined via atomicAdd or two-phase reduction kernel

memory.smem_register_spilling.note: Compiler-inserted smem spill stores/loads — verified by reduced local memory (STL/LDL) traffic

memory.tma_im2col_implicit_conv.note: TMA im2col mode instruction variant for Hopper implicit convolution

memory.distributed_smem.note: Cluster-scope shared memory load/store for distributed shared memory

memory.tensor_map_rebuild_avoid.note: TMA instructions with __grid_constant__ descriptor; PREFETCH.TENSORMAP in kernel prologue

latency.async_pipeline.note: Async pipeline instructions — cp.async with dependency barriers

latency.reduce_sync_count.note: Verified by reduced BAR.SYNC count in SASS disassembly

latency.warp_shuffle_sync.note: Shuffle instructions replacing shared memory sync

latency.tile_scheduler_swizzle.note: Tile scheduling is visible in kernel logic (blockIdx remapping) but not as specific SASS opcode

latency.persistent_kernel.note: Persistent kernel visible as outer loop in SASS but hard to grep specifically

latency.stream_k_load_balancing.note: Stream-K work stealing uses atomicCAS for job queue — verified by atomic ops + persistent outer loop

latency.online_recomputation.note: Online softmax: EX2 (exp2) + FMA for rescaling — verified by absence of O(N²) DRAM traffic

latency.warp_aggregated_atomics.note: Warp vote + shuffle + single atomic + popc — leader election pattern. require_all=true ensures pattern integrity.

latency.asymmetric_mbarrier_sync.note: Hardware mbarrier arrive/wait replacing __syncthreads for asymmetric producer-consumer

latency.pingpong_warpgroup_schedule.note: FA3 pingpong pattern: WGMMA + named barrier toggle between warpgroups + register reallocation

latency.intra_wg_gemm_softmax_pipeline.note: Intra-warpgroup pipeline: WGMMA interleaved with softmax EX2 and dep barriers

latency.static_launch_grid_graph.note: Static grid + early exit verified by kernel containing early-return branch on blockIdx

latency.cuda_graphs.note: CUDA Graphs is a runtime feature, not visible in kernel SASS

latency.cluster_launch_control_scheduler.note: Blackwell Cluster Launch Control: clusterlaunchcontrol.try_cancel / query for dynamic work stealing

latency.stream_event.note: Stream/event is a runtime feature, not visible in kernel SASS

latency.atomic_optimize.note: Atomic and reduction instructions — verify reduced count/contention. For warp-aggregated variant see latency.warp_aggregated_atomics.
